name: Pita Pesto Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (2 oz.) Shredded Part-Skim Mozzarella Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the knife blade in the processor.
2. Drop garlic and parsley through the food chute with the processor running; process for 15 seconds or until minced.
3. Add spinach, Parmesan, basil, and lemon juice; process for 30 seconds.
4. Scrape the bowl with a rubber spatula and process an additional 30 seconds or until smooth.
5. Split the pita breads into 4 rounds.
6. Spread 2 tablespoons of the spinach mixture over the interior of each pita round.
7. Top with bell pepper and cheese.
8. Bake at 450°F for 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
9. Serve warm.
